description: A screenshot of a letter on elementary school letterhead, dated April 23, 2026, shown as dark text on a white background with a circular school crest at the top. The heading names the school and its principal and assistant principal with an address and phone number. The body, addressed to families, references a community concern about serious allegations involving a former volunteer and states that the matter was reported to local police, with contact numbers provided for reporting information.
notable_text: MIRELES ELEMENTARY SCHOOL; April 23, 2026; Good Afternoon, Families; Anchored in Learning
